mapper.select: SELECT LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(user_code AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 8, '0') FROM users

where.if: AND ( CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR IFNULL(user_code, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_code, username, phone, avatar, status, promote_id, promote_name, coin_balance, token, country, new_user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{username}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{promoteId}, #{promoteName}, #{coinBalance}, #{token}, #{country}, #{newUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, promote_id = #{promoteId}, promote_name = #{promoteName}, coin_balance = #{coinBalance}, token = #{token}, country = #{country}, new_user_id = #{newUserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(status, 1) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(status, 1) != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count, COALESCE(SUM(coin_balance), 0) AS total_coins FROM users
